title: Why You Should Retain Republic Services (RSG) Stock for Now
text: Republic Services (RSG) puts consistent efforts into rewarding its shareholders through dividend payments and share repurchases.

title: Republic Services, Inc. Sets Date for Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: PHOENIX , June 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) will release its second quarter 2023 financial results after market close on Monday, July 31, 2023, and host an investor conference call at 5 p.m. Eastern Time that day.

title: 3 Waste Removal Stocks in Focus on World Environment Day 2023
text: Waste removal stocks like Waste Management (WM), Clean Harbors (CLH) and Republic Services (RSG), among others, are playing an active role in waste management and reducing plastic-related pollution.

title: Republic Services Completes Acquisition of GFL's Colorado and New Mexico Operations
text: PHOENIX, June 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG), a leader in the environmental services industry, today announced that it has completed its acquisition of GFL Environmental's Colorado and New Mexico operations. The vertically integrated operations include recycling, collection and disposal assets in four Colorado markets – Denver, Colorado Springs, Durango and Cañon City – as well as the Bloomfield, N.M.
